description: A collection of upstream regulator-circuit associations across studies, where each row represents a single modulated circuit linked to an upstream regulator within a given study.

items.description: Represents a single upstream regulator to modulated circuit mapping within a study.

study_name.description: Name of the study. Typically has multiple upstream regulators tested.

upstream_regulator_ensembl_gene_id.description: Ensembl gene ID of the upstream regulator tested to see which circuits it modulates. Can have multiple GO terms and modulated circuits associated with it.

go_term_associated_with_circuit.description: Gene Ontology (GO) term describing the biological process, molecular function, or cellular component associated with the upstream regulator.

modulated_circuit_list.description: Identifier of the gene set representing the modulated circuit, following the pattern 'gene_set_{N}'.
